tables.title: BK International Affiliates and Restaurant Counts (12/31/2024)
rows: BK AsiaPac, Pte. Ltd. (BK APac) and affiliate
8 Cross Street, Manulife Tower #28-01 to 07, Singapore 048424
Franchised: 1,851 (BK APac affiliate acquired 1,188 in Feb 2025)
130 King Street West, Ste 300, Toronto, Ontario M5X 1E1
tables.table_notes: Other than these 5 affiliates, no BK affiliates offer franchises or provide products under BK Marks. Carrols LLC is a US affiliate that operates BK restaurants and may sell to franchisees under Carrols Refranchise Program but does not offer franchises.

tables.title: Initial Fees
rows: Credited against initial franchise fee on opening

tables.table_notes: All fees nonrefundable except as expressly noted. Reclaim the Flame 2 Master Program Agreement, Crown Your Career Program, Carrols Refranchise Program (Term Sheet 5% Purchase Price Deposit) all governed by separate agreements. Two-year Multi-Unit New Development Incentive Program (2024) requires MTRA signed by 1/31/2024 for reduced royalty/ad rates.

tables.title: Other Fees (Item 6)
rows: Reduced under Multi-Unit DIP Y1-Y5: 2.5/3.0/3.5/3.5/4.0; FSS A/B reductions under Dev Agmt
Up to 4.5% of monthly Gross Sales
Currently 4.5% as of 1/1/2025; Fuel the Flame program: 4.5% through 12/31/2026, then 4.0% if 4-Wall EBITDA <$230K
Varies; 10% of capitalized site costs vs % Gross Sales; +12% every 5 yrs
Plus percentage rent: 8.5% on monthly GS up to $133,333.33, 10% above
Held by us for building improvement reimbursement
Lesser of 18% per annum or max legal rate
Up to $5,000 per Entity + up to $1,000 per Restaurant transferred
We are not obligated to extend or renew
Mobile app, website, third-party platforms; sole supplier BKC
If no outdoor digital menu board installed
TRA: $10,000; MTRA: balance of FA fee × Restaurants not developed
Remaining balance of prepaid franchise fees
If you fail or score non-passing
tables.table_notes: Royalty/ad reductions detailed in Notes 2-3. Multi-Unit New Dev Incentive royalty schedule yr1-6+: 2.5%/3.0%/3.5%/3.5%/4.0%/4.5%. Reclaim the Flame 2 successor royalty options: 4.5%/5.0%/5.5%/6.0%. Failed RTF2 remodel: +3.0% royalty. Crown Your Career remodel: +1%-5%. BKE/BKS supplier ownership: officers own General Mills, J&J, Kraft Heinz, PepsiCo (Item 8).

tables.title: Estimated Initial Investment — Traditional Freestanding Facility
rows: New Franchisee Training Fee, Travel & Living
Cash, Inventory Control & Order Taking System
Business Licenses, Utility Deposits, Lease Deposits
tables.table_notes: All payments non-refundable. Working capital covers 3 months of start-up. Double Drive Thru required for all facility types except food courts, in-lines, indoor MRS, Big Box Retail. Real estate range $250K-$2M for unimproved freestanding land.

tables.title: Estimated Initial Investment — Non-Traditional Facility Types
tables.table_notes: Indoor MRS low ($348,400) is the absolute system minimum (matches cover page disclosure). Franchise fee for non-traditional ranges $15,000-$50,000 depending on facility type and term.

tables.title: Item 8 — Required Purchase Economics
rows: % of costs to establish a Restaurant from approved/specification suppliers
% of non-occupancy operating expenses from approved/specification suppliers
BKC revenues from required franchisee purchases/leases (FY2024)
Required-purchase revenue as % of total BKC revenues
Supplier rebates contributed to ad fund as % of consolidated fund revenue (FY2024)
tables.table_notes: RSI (Restaurant Services Inc.) is the not-for-profit independent purchasing co-op with 21-member Board (18 franchisee, 1 minority franchisee, 1 BKC, 1 independent). BKC officers own publicly traded shares of General Mills, J&J, Kraft Heinz, PepsiCo.

tables.title: Advertising Fund Expenditures Fiscal 2024
rows: Other (research, PR, brand delivery, competitive positioning, promotion development)
tables.table_notes: Franchise Agreement minimum: 65% on working media. Annual audited statements available to franchisees on request. NFA/FAC consultative role; FAC has audit right but no decision authority.

tables.title: Training Program
rows: New Franchisee Training (Brand Orientation, BKC Shift Cert, BK University Team Member, Foundations Shift Control)
tables.table_notes: Mandatory before opening for Operating Partner/Managing Owner/Managing Director. ServSafe also required. $7,500 per trainee. IL requires classroom (no online cert). MOD Manual ~639 pages (Exhibit U). POS configuration: $20,000-$25,000 per Restaurant; ongoing software/maintenance $2,000-$4,000/yr; network $220-$450/month. Director of training: Greg Moscetti (since June 2025).

tables.title: Item 19 Section A — Sales Distributions Traditional & Non-Traditional (FY2024)
tables.table_notes: Sample: 5,837 of 6,229 Traditional (4,774 franchised + 1,063 company); 775 of 874 Non-Traditional (741 franchised + 34 company). Excluded: 76 company + 161 franchised temporarily closed; 1 company + 109 franchised permanently closed; 2 company + 43 franchised opened in 2024. Operating range 1-70 years. Bottom-quartile Non-Traditional risk: 29.8% below $0.9M (15.9% below $0.7M).

tables.title: Item 19 Section A — Fuel Co-Branded Sales Distributions (FY2024)
tables.table_notes: All Fuel Co-Branded reported are franchisee-owned. 320 of 320 open full year. Excludes truck stops and gas stations at travel plazas on interstate highways.

tables.title: Item 19 Section B — Remodel Sales/Traffic Uplift
tables.table_notes: 930 Traditional remodels with CAPEX ≥ $650K Jan 2018-Dec 2023; 893 in sample. Compared vs Control Restaurants (other Traditional in same DMA, similar seasonality, opened before 2016). Modern Image = Garden Grill, Pavilion, Sizzle. NOT a profit metric — sales uplift only.

tables.title: Item 20 Table 1 — Systemwide Outlet Summary
tables.table_notes: 5/16/2024 RBI acquired Carrols Restaurant Group, Inc.: 1,023 franchised → company-owned. Net U.S. system contraction over 3 years: -403 outlets (5.7%). Franchisee count contraction is structural (Carrols reacquisition) plus organic ceasing-operations decline.

tables.title: Item 20 Table 5 — Projected Openings Next Fiscal Year
rows: Franchise Agreements Signed But Outlets Not Opened
Projected New Franchised Outlets in Next Fiscal Year
Projected New Company-Owned Outlets in Next Fiscal Year
tables.table_notes: Per state breakdown: TX 6, NY 5, GA 4, NJ 4, PA 4, CA 3, AZ 2, FL 2, ID 2, IN 2, OK 2, UT 2, VA 2, MI 2 (company-owned), and 1 each in: AR, HI, KS, KY, MD, NM, NV, OR. Zero projected openings in many states.

tables.title: Item 20 — Exhibit O cross-reference
rows: List of US franchised Restaurants as of 12/31/2024 (pp 592-653)
List of BKC-owned Restaurants as of 12/31/2024 (pp 654-675)
List of Franchisees ceased operations / no communication within 10 weeks of issuance (pp 676-705) — count: 1,433
tables.table_notes: O3 count of 1,433 ceased/silent franchisees is a SIGNIFICANT churn indicator. NFA (National Franchisee Association) requested inclusion.

tables.title: Item 21 — RBI Consolidated Balance Sheet (in $ millions)
rows: Current portion of long-term debt and finance leases
tables.table_notes: RBI consolidates BKC, Tim Hortons, Popeyes, Firehouse Subs. Carrols acquisition (5/16/2024) added $705M operating lease assets, $684M operating lease liabilities, $363M reacquired franchise rights, $1,988M Carrols total assets, $1,171M Carrols total revenues. Firehouse Subs brand intangible: $816M (critical audit matter for impairment).

tables.title: Item 21 — RBI Consolidated Income Statement (in $ millions)
rows: Loss on early extinguishment of debt
Net income attributable to common shareholders
tables.table_notes: RBI consolidated, not BKC standalone. Diluted EPS: $3.18 (2024) vs $3.76 (2023). Carrols acquisition drove jump in company restaurant sales from $271M to $1,592M.
